notes: Ground-truth fixtures for ast-interpret-test-coverage interpreter. Uses dashboard/systems/ directory which has excellent coverage diversity: 4 TESTED, 3 HIGH UNTESTED, 7+ MEDIUM UNTESTED, 20+ LOW UNTESTED, 0 INDIRECTLY_TESTED+HIGH (known gap C-03-1). Files reference real source paths.

expected.notes: Has dedicated spec at __tests__/SystemsContainer.spec.tsx. Despite riskScore 3.39 (above HIGH threshold), TESTED files never emit TEST_GAP regardless of risk.
Composite query hook, 131 lines, high CC. No dedicated spec, no indirect coverage. Classic HIGH+UNTESTED -> P2 case.
URL state management hook with nuqs, high complexity. Highest riskScore in the directory.
Column definition hook, moderate complexity. MEDIUM+UNTESTED -> P3.
Presentational component just above MEDIUM threshold (1.5). Borderline case.
Barrel index file, minimal complexity. LOW+UNTESTED -> no TEST_GAP emission. Not worth testing directly.
Small presentational component below MEDIUM threshold. LOW+UNTESTED -> no TEST_GAP emission.

KNOWN GAP (C-03-1): riskScore 4.54 is well above HIGH threshold (3.0) but classifyRisk() only assigns HIGH/MEDIUM to UNTESTED files. INDIRECTLY_TESTED always gets LOW regardless of riskScore. This file SHOULD emit TEST_GAP but does not. The ground truth records the current (incorrect) behavior; the interpreter needs fixing per cleanup item C-03-1.
